channel.title: World
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from World, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Mandelson’s downfall is one of fastest ever seen in British public life
item.description: Epstein links have taken political operator from a vaunted position in British diplomacy to arrest in under six months Just six months ago Peter Mande...

item.title: Judge permanently bars US justice department from releasing report on Trump’s classified documents case – live
item.description: First amendment group criticizes Aileen Cannon’s order to permanently block release of Jack Smith report after dismissing case against Trump in 2024 M...

item.title: Majority believes Trump moving US in wrong direction, poll finds
item.description: Study released a day before State of the Union address shows president has lost support among Republicans Sign up for the Breaking News US email to ge...

item.title: News live: PM says he ‘volunteered’ support for removing former prince Andrew from succession; One Nation just behind Labor in new poll
item.description: Latest Capital Brief/DemosAU federal poll shows One Nation’s continued surge in support. Follow today’s news live Get our breaking news email , free a...

item.title: Ryan Coogler’s X-Files reboot lands with Danielle Deadwyler leading
item.description: Sinners film-maker’s much-anticipated relaunch of the paranormal hit show finally receives official green light Ryan Coogler ’s reboot of The X-Files ...

item.title: Queen tells Gisèle Pelicot her new memoir left her 'speechless'
item.description: Camilla praised the French rape survivor over tea at her Clarence House residence in London.

item.title: Lord Mandelson arrest - how did we get here?
item.description: It comes after the ex-Labour minister was accused of passing sensitive government information to Jeffrey Epstein.

item.title: Italian cricket in crisis amid sexual assault allegation
item.description: Italian cricket is in crisis days after the country's World Cup debut as it deals with an allegation of sexual assault by a senior figure within the n...

item.title: 'Burned and destroyed': Locals and tourists describe Mexico unrest
item.description: Violence has erupted across several states in Mexico after cartel leader El Mencho was killed on Sunday.

item.title: Mexico sends thousands of soldiers to stop violence after death of drug lord
item.description: A wave of violence has erupted across Mexico since a powerful drug cartel boss died following his capture by special forces.
